name: Carl Anderson
description: American singer, film and theatre actor (1945–2004)
abstract: Carlton Earl "Carl" Anderson (February 27, 1945 – February 23, 2004) was an American singer, film and theater actor best known for his portrayal of Judas Iscariot in the Broadway and film versions of the rock opera Jesus Christ Superstar by Andrew Lloyd Webber and Tim Rice. He and Gloria Loring performed the duet "Friends and Lovers", wh…

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
